name: getInformation
description: Search the conversation log database for historical information using keywords. Always execute a fresh database search — never reuse results from previous getInformation calls. If a previous search returned no results, try different keyword_groups with more variants or alternative phrasings. Use keyword_groups (with variants and optional parts) for best results; keywords is a simpler fallback. Results include channel_id, timestamp, sender, and content. Does NOT return timeline data — for chronological event history call getTimeline, for date-range queries call getHistory. Set includeAliasSearch in toolsconfig to enable automatic alias resolution (e.g. nicknames, creature types). Only report what the tool returns — do not invent or extrapolate facts.

keyword_groups.description: Preferred: list of concept groups. Each group covers one entity with multiple name variants and optional sub-parts for partial matching.

keywords.description: Fallback: free-form search phrases using full forms only (no internal splitting).
